programme.title: Colors
programme.desc: As members of the Los Angeles Police Department's elite anti-gang unit, a seasoned cop (Robert Duvall) and his new partner (Sean Penn) are called in to assist with the crackdown against the mounting gang violence in the slums of East Los Angeles.

programme.title: Dark Blue
programme.desc: When the LAPD's elite Special Investigations Squad (SIS) is assigned a high-profile quadruple homicide, veteran detective Eldon Perry (Kurt Russell) takes the case. Known for his tough street tactics and a fiery temper, Eldon also tutors rookie Bobby Keough (Scott Speedman) in the grim realities of police intimidation and corruption. While navigating the tumultuous neighborhoods of South Central L.A., Perry and Keough must track down the cold-blooded killers as well as face their own demons - demons that prove more ruthless than the criminals they pursue.

programme.title: Enter The Ninja
programme.desc: When Cole (Franco Nero), a westerner trained in the deadly fighting rituals of Ninjitsu, is suddenly dragged into a dangerous dispute with an oil baron, he must face the best assassin money can buy, Ninja Hasegawa (martial arts legend Sho Kosugi)!

programme.title: Revenge Of The Ninja
programme.desc: When a band of Ninja assassins slaughters the family of Cho Osaki (Sho Kosugi), he flees to America in the hope of building a new life. Osaki tries to escape his deadly past but soon discovers he has become the pawn of a ruthless drug trafficker.

programme.title: Ninja III: The Domination
programme.desc: Possessed by the spirit of a diabolical Ninja assassin and dominated by his relentless rage, a young, attractive woman sets out to brutally attack and destroy his enemies. Can her boyfriend and a martial arts master possibly save her soul?

programme.title: Rage Of Honor
programme.desc: When his partner is killed during a drug bust, a federal agent throws away his badge and the rule book with it. Arming himself with an array of deadly weaponry including nunchucks and ninja stars, he sets out to settle the score with the bad guys.

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: Chuck Norris is back in this action-packed martial arts showcase co-starring the legendary Lee Van Cleef. Norris takes on his adoptive brother and a training camp where terrorists are being taught the secret killing techniques of the ninja!

programme.title: Breaker! Breaker!
programme.desc: Breaker! Breaker! stars Chuck Norris at his butt-kicking best as a trucker on a mission to locate his kidnapped brother and bring down a corrupt Judge (George Murdock) who may just have played a role in the disappearance.

programme.title: Invasion U.S.A.
programme.desc: An army of terrorist mercenaries led by Soviet agent Rostov (Richard Lynch) catches America unprepared and makes it into a war zone. Only one man can stem the rising tide of violence: retired agent and martial arts expert Matt Hunter (Chuck Norris).

programme.title: Lone Wolf Mcquade
programme.desc: Chuck Norris is Lone Wolf McQuade, a Texas Ranger feared by outlaws and respected by other lawmen. When McQuade uncovers a gun smuggling operation, the action explodes, with McQuade wreaking havoc on all those who come between him and the law.

programme.title: Code Of Silence
programme.desc: Chuck Norris stars in this turbo-charged thriller that pits an honest cop against two crime lords and his own department. Henry Silva and Dennis Farina also star in a film that explodes with heart-stopping chases and martial arts confrontations.

programme.title: The Delta Force
programme.desc: Political extremists have taken innocent people hostage…and only super-soldiers Chuck Norris, Lee Marvin and The Delta Force can rescue them in this explosive adventure filled with wall-to-wall action! Martin Balsam and Shelley Winters also star.

programme.title: Delta Force 2: The Colombian Connection
programme.desc: Chuck Norris is in peak form in this explosive action/adventure that brings back one of his most unforgettable characters, Delta Force Colonel Scott McCoy, for a daring mission to destroy a deadly drug cartel led by the ruthless Billy Drago!
